failures.reason: The actual answer confirms the Transformer can handle variable-length sequences but omits the specific range (512 to 1M+ tokens) of the context length hyperparameter that the expected answer explicitly states the document mentions. This omission represents an important detail from the expected answer, making the actual answer incomplete while still capturing some key information (the ability to handle variable-length sequences).
